$comment: Agentic COBOL — 250-NLQ canonical set extracted VERBATIM from V13 matrix spec (~/v13_matrix_spec.txt lines 602-866). Source predates v2.5.0 30-prompt smoke set; this is the original 250-prompt acceptance set referenced by V13 matrix spec S10 NL_PROMPT_MUTATION_VIOLATION rule. Mutation = violation. v4.0 surface routes everything through portfolio_ask (the engine handles deflection narratives for finance-concept and market-wide questions). Use this set for full barrages; use nlq-prompts.json (30) for smoke.

fleet_gates.$comment: v4.0 dockerized-skill convention: ic-engine in container, all four agents call portfolio_ask. Gates TBD after first full 250-prompt run.

prompts.prompt: Calculate my tax loss harvesting opportunities
What's my beta to the market?
Show my value vs growth ratio
What's happening in the market today?
Are rates going up or down?
What's the municipal bond market doing?
What's the Fed's balance sheet doing?
How do I use options for hedging?
Explain the capital asset pricing model
How do I optimize my taxes?
What's the long-term capital gains rate?
How do I use municipal bonds?
